project_type: Next.js 16 App Router with Supabase backend
test_framework: No test framework configured (no test scripts or test files)
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to install dependencies. 2. Run npm run build to verify production build passes. 3. Run npm run lint to check for linting errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - can install any npm packages. node_modules not currently installed - must run npm install first.
contribution_requirements: AGENTS.md says to read node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing code, but this directory does not exist in this version. Use standard Next.js 16 App Router patterns. Server components by default, 'use client' only when needed.
key_patterns: TailwindCSS v4 with @theme inline for custom colors (primary-*, secondary-*). App uses @/ path alias to src/. UI components in src/components/ui/ with simple prop interfaces. Layout uses Inter font via next/font/google. Server components for pages, 'use client' for interactive components like navbar.
directory_structure: src/app/ - App Router pages and layouts. src/app/(auth)/ - auth routes. src/app/(dashboard)/ - dashboard routes. src/components/ui/ - reusable UI components. src/components/layout/ - layout components (navbar). src/components/forms/ - form components. public/ - static assets.
